domain_summary: ドット絵・GLB/GLTF・画像プレートを3D空間に配置し、固定画角の展示ビューとして見せる Web オーサリングツール。ゲームではない。スタック: React + TypeScript + Vite + three.js (R3F + drei + postprocessing + zustand)。
protected_areas: src/store.ts の Doc スナップショット/Undo 履歴ロジック
Scene JSON v2 アセット重複排除 (hashDataUrl/serialize/migrateSceneFile)
固定画角 Viewer (viewerLocked) の編集不可前提
required_commands: verify: npm run build (tsc -b && vite build)
verification_entrypoints: npm run build による型チェック
preview ツールでの実機目視確認
release_constraints: public repo popcoondev/pixel-showcase-engine-v2、SemVer タグ + GitHub Release
main push で Firebase Hosting に自動デプロイ。push/release は human maintainer 承認後
approval_boundary: slice scope / release / publish hosting は human maintainer 承認。cadence 自動化が .aof を main に直接書き込むことは禁止。

categories.purpose: Inspect current runtime state, registries, and operator-facing summaries.
Validate integrity, drift, and benchmark-grade compliance.
Write canonical runtime artifacts, decisions, and state transitions.
Advance the runtime, orchestration, or repair path.
Export or visualize evidence, metrics, lineage, and analytics.

top_commands.purpose: Read the command registry so operators and AI can route without loading the full CLI reference.
Verify that bootstrap, orientation, and command registry routing surfaces remain aligned.
Execute a council stage and optionally invoke model-backed seats.
Seed a project with the canonical AOF runtime skeleton and recognition packet.
Benchmark whether Need Validation rejects, reframes, and gates project creation correctly.
Read the operator-facing organization summary and active goals.
Verify bootstrap, organization, capability, and command-routing integrity.
Verify that active release refs and governed release surfaces remain aligned.
Start an AOF runtime session from a user request.
Upgrade an existing AOF installation to the current bootstrap shape.

runtime_flow: Read the command register first to route without loading the full CLI reference.
Use read commands to inspect runtime state before changing artifacts.
Use verify commands before claiming correctness or release readiness.
Use write commands to persist canonical artifacts and governed state changes.
Use execute commands to move the runtime or orchestration loop forward.
Use observe commands when exporting visibility, metrics, or analytical outputs.
